title: timesheet
description: A timesheet record extracted from CapWeb mail/attachments. Leave a field null rather than guess; low-confidence records are routed to human review, not reconciliation.

id.description: stable id for this timesheet (e.g. Gmail message id + index)

client.description: client/payee name; reconciliation matches on this + period

period.description: billing period key, e.g. '2026-05' or '2026-W21' — must match the invoice's period string exactly

hours.description: hours worked; compared exactly against the invoice

amount.description: expected amount (hours x rate) if stated; null if not present

confidence.description: 0-1 extraction confidence; below threshold => human review, not reconcile
